title: spermacoce eupatorioides
intro: Spermacoce eupatorioides, also known as Wood's pepper or bitter button, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its bitter and astringent qualities. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat digestive issues and skin problems. Spermacoce eupatorioides is often prepared for medicinal use through herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
